name: To My Dearest Friend
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder uses Exalt, all allies' Crit. Rate + [StateArg1]% this turn.
lore:
"You've been gone so long, and I didn't even notice.

I still keep dreaming of that day—the gunshot pain in my left arm, the blood loss haze, the frenzied rats chasing us...
Then you appeared, in your Mythag uniform, getting me out of that cursed old castle.

At the dream's end, you stood beside my sickbed and told me:
for investigators, death is always close behind.

I can no longer tell reality from dream.

Whenever I am confused, I reach for my left arm—if I feel the cold, intricate metal, I know I'm awake.

But most times, I grasp nothing but air."
